checks.description: Public benchmark accepts only synthetic/sample text, not customer private corpora.
PointerGuard allow/caution/forbid policy active and forbid zones blocked from public path.
Operational smoke gate passes for latest control chain run.
Webhook alert automation is wired for failure/guard events.
Expose only benchmark metrics (p50/p95/p99/RPS/error) with timestamp and environment note.
Public endpoint enforces request-size limit, rate limit, and abuse control (captcha/throttle).
No codebook internals, policy tuning internals, or customer prompts are exposed in public response.
Published '/' and '/ko/' pages must actively bind the public payload JSON at runtime.
Published '/benchmark/' and '/ko/benchmark/' bind bench landing payload + open-bench section markers.

notes: Shadow launch is allowed before full public launch when scope/abuse guard checks are incomplete.
Global/public claims must remain conditional until service-load evidence keeps passing over time.
